Compare Solutions

Why teams choose GLUCOSE over traditional solutions

Enterprise teams need autonomous AI agents that understand context, deliver personalized experiences, and scale effortlessly—not rule-based chatbots that frustrate customers.

Book a Demo Explore GLUCOSE
The Difference

What makes GLUCOSE different?

See why leading brands are switching from traditional chatbots and generic AI solutions to GLUCOSE's autonomous agents.

✕
Traditional Chatbot
U
User
I want to change my delivery address for order #12345 and also ask about the warranty
B
Bot
I can help you with delivery. Please select an option:
1. Track order
2. Change address
3. Cancel order
U
Change address
B
Please enter your new address
U
123 Main St. Also, what about the warranty?
B
I'm sorry, I can only help with one thing at a time. Please start a new conversation for warranty questions.
😡
→
✓
GLUCOSE AI
U
User
I want to change my delivery address for order #12345 and also ask about the warranty
G
GLUCOSE
I'd be happy to help with both! Let me update the delivery address for order #12345 to 123 Main St.

✅ Done!

Regarding warranty: Your product comes with a 2-year manufacturer warranty covering defects.

Would you like me to:
1) Email the full warranty details
2) Register your product
3) Start a warranty claim?
😊

Goal-driven reasoning, not scripted responses

Traditional chatbots follow rigid decision trees that break when conversations shift. GLUCOSE agents reason through complexity, adapting to context and pursuing goals autonomously.

  • Understands intent even with unexpected questions
  • Handles multi-turn, complex conversations naturally
  • Balances user needs with business objectives
Autonomous Goal Pursuit
GLUCOSE agents work toward outcomes, not just responses. They understand context, remember history, and make intelligent decisions.
U
"Actually, wait—can I also ask about warranty coverage?"
G
"Of course! Your vehicle's warranty includes 4-year coverage. I'll also continue helping with the service booking—would you prefer morning or afternoon?"

Native multi-channel, not bolted-on integrations

Most solutions treat messaging channels as an afterthought. GLUCOSE is built from the ground up for WhatsApp, Telegram, LINE, and more—meeting customers where they already are.

  • Deploy on WhatsApp, Telegram, LINE, Viber, and more
  • Consistent experience across all channels
  • No app downloads required for customers
Deploy Everywhere
One configuration, every channel. Your brand shows up wherever your customers prefer to communicate.
WhatsApp
Telegram
LINE
GLUCOSE

No-code setup, not months of development

Traditional enterprise AI deployments take months and require technical teams. GLUCOSE's Management Console lets product managers configure, deploy, and iterate without writing code.

  • Visual journey builder for business users
  • Deploy in days, not months
  • Iterate and improve without engineering support
Management Console
Define customer journeys, configure responses, and analyze performance—all through an intuitive interface designed for business users.
Add Docs
Add Tools
Configure
Go Live

Proactive re-engagement, not just reactive support

Traditional chatbots wait for customers to ask questions. GLUCOSE agents proactively engage—sharing relevant information, following up on service needs, and driving conversions.

  • Scheduled follow-ups and reminders
  • Event-triggered communications (IoT, CRM, etc.)
  • Personalized product recommendations
Always-On Engagement
GLUCOSE doesn't just answer—it anticipates. Proactive outreach keeps customers engaged throughout their journey.
G
"Hi! Your vehicle's 10,000km service is coming up. I noticed a convenient slot available next Tuesday at 10am. Would you like me to book it?"
U
"Yes, that works perfectly!"
G
"Done! I've booked your service and sent a calendar invite. Need a reminder the day before?"
Feature Comparison

GLUCOSE vs. Alternatives

See how GLUCOSE compares to traditional chatbots and generic AI solutions.

Features GLUCOSE Traditional Chatbots Generic AI (GPT wrappers)
Goal-driven autonomous reasoning
Native multi-channel deployment
No-code configuration
Proactive customer engagement
Enterprise CRM/CDP integrations
IoT event-triggered actions
First-party data insights
Enterprise security (SOC 2, ISO 27001)
Brand voice consistency
Enterprise Comparison

GLUCOSE vs. AI-Native Platforms

How GLUCOSE compares to enterprise AI platforms in the market today.

Capability GLUCOSE Salesforce AgentForce Sierra AI
Closes deals without human intervention
Engages customers on WhatsApp, LINE, Telegram natively
Proactive lifecycle re-engagement (Planner)
Model-agnostic (no vendor lock-in)
Vertical-specific product corpus architecture
Live in weeks, not months
Multimodal (voice, text, images, video)
Single-tenant deployment option
Outcome-based pricing

The Engagement Stack, Reimagined

Legacy Era
  • CRM stores records
  • Chatbots answer questions
  • Marketing automates campaigns
  • Humans follow up
Agentic Era
  • GLUCOSE orchestrates experiences
  • GLUCOSE executes goals
  • GLUCOSE adapts in real time
  • Planner reengages autonomously
Our Customers

The results speak for themselves

GLUCOSE is trusted by leading brands across industries to transform customer engagement.

"The platform's ability to understand context and deliver personalized responses transformed customer support operations. It's like having a team of experts available 24/7."
Gennady K.
CEO, Technology Services
"GLUCOSE changed how we think about customer engagement. The AI doesn't just respond—it understands our products and brand voice perfectly."
Product Head
Lifestyle Mobility
"We've seen a dramatic improvement in response quality and customer satisfaction since implementing GLUCOSE. The autonomous agents handle complex queries with ease."
Tech Lead
Enterprise Software
"The platform handles everything from warranty inquiries to service bookings autonomously. Our customers get instant, accurate responses around the clock."
Service Manager
Automotive
"Patient engagement has never been easier. The AI understands medical context and provides appropriate guidance while maintaining compliance."
Digital Health Director
Healthcare
"Our customers receive personalized financial guidance instantly. The compliance guardrails give us confidence to scale without risk."
VP Customer Experience
Financial Services
"Post-purchase support is now a competitive advantage. Customers love getting instant help with setup and troubleshooting."
Product Manager
Consumer Electronics
"We reduced support costs by 40% while improving CSAT scores. The AI handles routine queries so our team can focus on complex issues."
CX Operations Lead
Telecommunications
"Subscriber engagement increased significantly. The AI recommends content and handles account queries with our brand's personality."
Head of Growth
Media & Entertainment
Pricing

Pricing tied to outcomes, not seats

GLUCOSE's pricing model is aligned with the value it delivers. You pay for results — not licenses, not seats, not per-message fees.
